name: Ferplast Brush gO 5924
description: Key Features • Soft Bristles: Removes loose hair and dirt without irritation. • For All Coat Lengths: Suitable for short, medium, and long fur. • Enhances Shine: Promotes a soft, glossy coat with regular use. • For Dogs & Cats: Perfect for single or multi-pet households. Benefits Regular grooming with the GRO 5924 helps reduce shedding, maintain coat cleanliness, and strengthen the bond between you and your pet. Easy to use and effective, it’s an essential tool for everyday grooming
